UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.bAllowPlayerToClea: Allow Players to reset their progress data from the game MENU.
UserOptionDefinition.69381E404F4AA203FFB607BD3FBAEAF5: Clears any saved data for a specific player.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_C.Clear Data for Player: Clears any saved data for a specific player.
UserOptionDefinition.AFB0FD9B4213F4A3897B94819FA85C4B: Clears saved data for all players in the current session.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_C.ClearDataForAllPlayer: Clears saved data for all players in the current session.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.EnabledDuringPhase: Determines the game phases during which the device will be enabled.
Determines when the player's data is auto-loaded.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.Auto-Load.Descript: Determines whether the player's data is auto-loaded.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.bAutoSave.Descript: Determines whether the player's data is saved automatically as they play.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_C.Disable.Description: Disables the device on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.2E13AA38442C8351DB0657BC687A67C5: Disables the device on receiving an event.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_C.Enable.Description: Enables the device on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.6967B2DC4AA7D67C3342D0BE5064B7B5: Enables the device on receiving an event.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.SaveScoreboardStat: If set to Round, only the current round's scoreboard stats are saved between rounds. If Career, only career stats are saved. If Both, both round and career are saved. If round stats are saved with the Round or Both options, round end conditions may get met if save data is loaded at round start.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.LoadAllPlayers.Des: Loads all the set players data when receiving an event.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_C.LoadPlayer.Descriptio: Loads the set player data when receiving a signal from this channel.
UserOptionDefinition.5922FC984C51BF3C315BAC80B704B5F7: Loads the set player data when receiving an event.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.bSaveFullAmmoMagaz: Restores full magazines on loading players data or if set to No restores the exact amount of ammo the player had when the data was saved.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.bSaveHealthAndShie: Save the player's current health and shield as part of the data.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.SaveAllScoreboardS: Saves all the player's current stat data that appears on the scoreboard.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.SaveAllPlayers.Des: Saves data for all players from a distance.
UserOptionDefinition.86601FC046F6EB345AD521BE2DD486F9: Saves data from a distance. Does nothing if interacted with from an eliminated player.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_C.SavePlayer.Descriptio: Saves data from a distance. Does nothing if interacted with from an eliminated player.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.bSaveCheckpoint.De: Saves the player's checkpoint data so that they will respawn at the last checkpoint they activated.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.bSaveClass.Descrip: Saves the player's current Class number. Player will be assigned to that team upon loading, triggering the relevant class designer device.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.bSaveTeam.Descript: Saves the player's current Team number. Player will be assigned to that team upon loading, triggering any team settings device related.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.bSaveGold.Descript: Saves the player's current gold as part of the data.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.bSaveBuildingResou: Saves the player's current resources as part of the data.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.bSavePlayerLocatio: Saves the player's location so that when they initially spawn, they will spawn at the last position saved (only functional if 'Auto-Load is not off')
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.SaveAssists.Descri: Saves the round and/or career assists count depending on the Save Scoreboard Stats setting.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.SaveCreaturesElimi: Saves the round and/or career creature eliminations count depending on the Save Scoreboard Stats setting.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.SaveEliminations.D: Saves the round and/or career eliminations count depending on the Save Scoreboard Stats setting.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.SaveCollectedItems: Saves the round and/or career items collected count depending on the Save Scoreboard Stats setting.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.SaveRoundWins.Desc: Saves the round and/or career round wins count depending on the Save Scoreboard Stats setting.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.SaveScore.Descript: Saves the round and/or career score depending on the Save Scoreboard Stats setting.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_V2_C.On Cleared.Descrip: When a player clears data, they'll send an event to linked devices.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_C.On Player Loaded.Desc: When a player reloads save data, they'll send a message on this channel.
UserOptionDefinition.C77ECFF84EE29E30C4C97692D01361AF: When a player reloads save data, they'll send an event to linked devices.
UserOptionDefinition.8810E0BD47D8991445F195BA933B68CA: When data is saved, sends an event to linked devices.
UserOptionDefinition.Device_SavePoint_C.On Activation.Descrip: When data is saved, transmit on this channel.
